center.name: Novitates Zoologicae
center.summary: Novitates Zoologicae是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括義大利麻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This hybrid swarm shows a full range of characters from nearly pure house sparrows to nearly pure Spanish sparrows and everything between. The Italian sparrow is associated with human habitations, inhabiting towns, cities, and agricultural areas
